title: Corner Entity
description: is an atmospheric horror mod that turns your peaceful Minecraft survival into a nerve-wracking experience. You will never feel truly safe again, as something is watching you from the shadows, waiting for the perfect moment to strike.
body:
![Corner Entity](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5d0ffc14b0af2b6875ded89bdcdf2570370e46ed.png)

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/bHYMa2QzT2s" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allowfullscreen></iframe>

> A psychological horror mod for Minecraft.

## About

Corner Entity adds a mysterious entity that appears near the player during normal gameplay.

It does not chase or attack directly. Instead, it silently watches from a distance, creating tension and uncertainty.

Approaching it causes it to disappear, but every encounter may lead to unpredictable events.

## Features

* Random appearances during gameplay
* Psychological horror atmosphere
* Unpredictable events and outcomes
* Jumpscares and audio/visual effects
* Fully configurable mechanics
* Multiplayer support
* Fabric and Forge support

## Configuration

The mod works out of the box with no additional setup.

### Fabric

Install **Mod Menu** to access the in-game configuration screen.

Without Mod Menu, the mod will still work using default settings.

### Forge

Forge currently uses a configuration file instead of an in-game settings screen.

After launching the game once, the configuration file will be created at:

```text
.minecraft/config/devcounterentity-forge.toml
```

You can edit this file manually to customize the mod's behavior.

## Requirements

### Fabric

* Fabric Loader
* Fabric API

### Forge

* Forge

## Optional (Fabric Only)

* Mod Menu — enables the in-game configuration screen

## Compatibility

* Minecraft 1.20.1+
* Singleplayer
* Multiplayer
* Dedicated Servers

## Warning

This mod contains horror elements, jumpscares, and sudden audio/visual effects.

Play at your own risk.
